content.problemStatement:
Given two arrays AAA and BBB each of length NNN.

Find the value в€‘i=1Nв€‘j=1NmaxвЃЎ(AiвЉ•Bj,Ai&Bj)\sum_{i=1}^N\sum_{j=1}^N \max(A_i\oplus B_j,A_i\& B_j)в€‘i=1NвЂ‹в€‘j=1NвЂ‹max(AiвЂ‹вЉ•BjвЂ‹,AiвЂ‹&BjвЂ‹).

Here вЉ•\oplusвЉ• and &\&& denote the bitwise XOR operation and bitwise AND operation respectively.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT - the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN - the length of arrays AAA and BBB.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,вЂ¦,ANA_1,A_2,вЂ¦,A_NA1вЂ‹,A2вЂ‹,вЂ¦,ANвЂ‹ representing the array AAA.
The third line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers B1,B2,вЂ¦,BNB_1,B_2,вЂ¦,B_NB1вЂ‹,B2вЂ‹,вЂ¦,BNвЂ‹ representing the array BBB.


Output Format
For each test case, output the value в€‘i=1Nв€‘j=1NmaxвЃЎ(AiвЉ•Bj,Ai&Bj)\sum_{i=1}^N\sum_{j=1}^N \max(A_i\oplus B_j,A_i\& B_j)в€‘i=1NвЂ‹в€‘j=1NвЂ‹max(AiвЂ‹вЉ•BjвЂ‹,AiвЂ‹&BjвЂ‹).
constraints: Sum of NNN does not exceed 2в‹…1052\cdot 10^52в‹…105 over all test cases.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 111: For the given arrays, the value is: maxвЃЎ(3вЉ•1,3&1)+maxвЃЎ(3вЉ•2,3&2)+maxвЃЎ(4вЉ•1,4&1)+maxвЃЎ(4вЉ•2,4&2)=2+2+5+6=15\max(3\oplus 1,3\& 1) + \max(3\oplus 2,3\& 2) + \max(4\oplus 1,4\& 1) + \max(4\oplus 2,4\& 2) = 2 + 2 + 5 + 6 = 15max(3вЉ•1,3&1)+max(3вЉ•2,3&2)+max(4вЉ•1,4&1)+max(4вЉ•2,4&2)=2+2+5+6=15.


Test Case 222: For the given arrays, the value is: maxвЃЎ(0вЉ•0,0&0)=0\max(0\oplus 0,0\& 0) = 0max(0вЉ•0,0&0)=0.


Test Case 333: For the given arrays, the value is: maxвЃЎ(2вЉ•1,2&1)+maxвЃЎ(2вЉ•2,2&2)+maxвЃЎ(2вЉ•1,2&1)+maxвЃЎ(4вЉ•1,4&1)+maxвЃЎ(4вЉ•2,4&2)+maxвЃЎ(4вЉ•1,4&1)+maxвЃЎ(3вЉ•1,3&1)+maxвЃЎ(3вЉ•2,3&2)+maxвЃЎ(3вЉ•1,3&1)\max(2\oplus 1,2\& 1) + \max(2\oplus 2,2\& 2) + \max(2\oplus 1,2\& 1) + \max(4\oplus 1,4\& 1) + \max(4\oplus 2,4\& 2) + \max(4\oplus 1,4\& 1) + \max(3\oplus 1,3\& 1) + \max(3\oplus 2,3\& 2) + \max(3\oplus 1,3\& 1)max(2вЉ•1,2&1)+max(2вЉ•2,2&2)+max(2вЉ•1,2&1)+max(4вЉ•1,4&1)+max(4вЉ•2,4&2)+max(4вЉ•1,4&1)+max(3вЉ•1,3&1)+max(3вЉ•2,3&2)+max(3вЉ•1,3&1)
=3+2+3+5+6+5+2+2+2=30= 3 + 2 + 3 + 5 + 6 + 5 + 2 + 2 + 2 = 30=3+2+3+5+6+5+2+2+2=30.
